style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;fontSize=18;" value="<font>State Transition Conditions:</font><div><ol type="1" style="direction: ltr; unicode-bidi: embed; margin-top: 0in; margin-bottom: 0in; font-family: Calibri;"> <li value="1" style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font>If left QRD sees white, LF Turn Left</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font>If center QRD sees white, LF Drive Forward</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font>If in lander and sees front or has gone enough distance, satellite</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font>If ball collect photodiode goes high, ball collect</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font>If all QRDs black and wall on left, Canyon Drive Forward</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font>If right QRD sees white, LF Turn Right</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font>If sees all white, LF Drive Forward</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font>If ball collected and center QRD sees white, LF Drive Forward</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font>If center QRD sees white, LF Drive Forward</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font>If ball collected and center QRD does not see white, LF Turn Right</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font>If the QRDs see white and left sharp sees a wall, LF Turn Left</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font>If three QRDs see white, LF Turn left</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font>If ball returned and three QRDs see white, LF Turn Left</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font>If ball returned and three QRDs see white, LF Turn Right</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font>If center QRD sees line and left SHARP sees wall, Ball Return</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font>If three QRDs see white and left SHARP does not see wall, LF Turn Right</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font>If has made 90 deg turn, Canyon Drive Forward</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font>If front SHARP sees wall and left SHARP sees wall, Canyon Turn Right</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font>If front SHARP sees wall and left SHARP does not see wall, Canyon Turn Left</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font>If has made 90 deg turn, Canyon Drive Forward&nbsp;</font></li><br></ol></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="320" width="710" x="90" y="830" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LqwVL3fsUG4g1UIRKdcn-77" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font style="font-size: 30px;">Bobbi's Finite State Machine:</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="460" x="-35" y="-130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

ol.style: direction: ltr; unicode-bidi: embed; margin-top: 0in; margin-bottom: 0in; font-family: Calibri;

li.font: If left QRD sees white, LF Turn Left
If center QRD sees white, LF Drive Forward
If in lander and sees front or has gone enough distance, satellite
If ball collect photodiode goes high, ball collect
If all QRDs black and wall on left, Canyon Drive Forward
If right QRD sees white, LF Turn Right
If sees all white, LF Drive Forward
If ball collected and center QRD sees white, LF Drive Forward
If center QRD sees white, LF Drive Forward
If ball collected and center QRD does not see white, LF Turn Right
If the QRDs see white and left sharp sees a wall, LF Turn Left
If three QRDs see white, LF Turn left
If ball returned and three QRDs see white, LF Turn Left
If ball returned and three QRDs see white, LF Turn Right
If center QRD sees line and left SHARP sees wall, Ball Return
If three QRDs see white and left SHARP does not see wall, LF Turn Right
If has made 90 deg turn, Canyon Drive Forward
If front SHARP sees wall and left SHARP sees wall, Canyon Turn Right
If front SHARP sees wall and left SHARP does not see wall, Canyon Turn Left
If has made 90 deg turn, Canyon Drive Forward

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 458px; height: 1px; padding-top: 45px; margin-left: 46px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
